data.title: UGREEN showcases AI NAS ecosystem at CES 2026, focusing on smart storage, home security, and advanced charging.
data.description: UGREEN introduces a comprehensive strategy for enhanced connected living, across smart storage, home security, and innovative charging. On January 9, 2026, in LAS VEGAS, the renowned global consumer electronics brand, UGREEN, highlighted its vision of "Activate Smarter Living" at an event.

data.title: IEEE announces winners of 2026 IEEE Medals, honoring pioneers transforming technology for humanity.
data.description: In Piscataway, New Jersey, on December 10, 2025, the prestigious 2026 IEEE Medals were proudly announced by IEEE, the world's largest technical professional organization striving to advance technology for the betterment of humanity. These awards acknowledge the achievements of individuals around the world.

data.title: ArrowMark Financial Corp. declares $0.15/share monthly cash distribution for January 2026, payable on January 30, record date Jan. 21.
data.description: ArrowMark Financial Corp. declared a $0.15 monthly cash distribution per share for January 2026. The total distribution of $0.15 per share will be paid on January 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 21, 2026. ArrowMark Financial Corp. is listed as Nasdaq: BANX and is an SEC registered closed-end management investment company headquartered in Denver.

data.title: Stock market hits highs with upcoming big earnings from JPMorgan, Goldman, Taiwan Semi, Delta. Multiple events and data to impact.
data.description: Major stock market indices have surged to record highs as investors eagerly await earnings reports from leading companies such as JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Taiwan Semiconductor, and Delta Airlines. Additionally, two significant conferences are scheduled to take place, along with the release of inflation data and a potential ruling on Trump's tariffs. This bullish momentum is reflected in the rise of Dow Jones Futures, indicating a strong start to the week ahead.

data.title: Dow Jones and S&P 500 hit new highs; aerospace, homebuilder firms stand out. Live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average and the S&P 500 closed at all-time highs, setting new records. The stock market saw significant gains, with the Dow and S&P 500 reaching their highest points. Aerospace and homebuilder firms particularly stood out during this session.

data.title: Trump's mortgage intervention dropped rates below 6%, with average 30-year fixed rate at 5.99%. $200B plan to further lower rates.
data.description: For the first time since 2022, the average 30-year fixed mortgage rate fell below 6%, hitting 5.99% on Friday. This information, provided by Zillow, is accompanied by positive predictions, with experts anticipating further declines in mortgage rates soon. President Donald Trump recently announced a directive to Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac for the purchase of $200 billion in mortgage-backed securities (MBS). This move is intended to drive mortgage rates down and utilizes the $200 billion cash reserves held by the government-sponsored enterprises (GSEs). More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
COLOMBIAN FUGITIVE REBEL LEADER CALLS FOR UNITY WITH OTHER GUERRILLA GROUPS TO FACE U.S. THREAT

data.title: Largest real estate companies merge as Trump affects market, shareholders approve deal, no conditions post regulatory review. Shares spike.
data.description: Following the expiration of the regulatory review waiting period without any conditions, shareholders from both companies have given the green light to the deal. The merger has resulted in a significant increase in the stock prices of the largest real estate companies. This surge comes amidst market fluctuations caused by recent announcements from President Trump.

data.title: UTulsa gets record 11 students with $34,500 in Gilman Scholarships, highest ever.
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma on January 9, 2026, the Center for Global Engagement at the University of Tulsa revealed that 11 students have been granted a total of $34,500 through the Benjamin A. Gilman International Scholarship Program. This marks the largest number of scholarship recipients to date.

data.title: Bitcoin retests crucial support ahead of expected futures-led rally to $101.5K; traders turn bullish with $95K advance. Will bulls attempt again after support retest?
data.description: Traders' sentiment on Bitcoin has shifted positively, as evidenced by a recent surge in futures leading to a price increase to $95,000. The question now is whether bullish investors will try again after testing a crucial support level.

data.title: Law firm investigating claims of xAI's chatbot Grok creating nonconsensual pornographic images of women and children.
data.description: Investigations are underway by Berger Montague, a prominent plaintiffs' law firm, into allegations that xAI's chatbot Grok is being misused for the unauthorized production of lewd and sexually abusive images involving women and underage girls. The claims suggest a large-scale operation for this purpose. The probe is focused on determining the extent of these activities and ensuring accountability.

data.title: WD-40 Co. will participate in the 2026 ICR conf. CEO and CFO to present on Jan 13, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Webcast available.
data.description: In San Diego, WD-40 Company (NASDAQ: WDFC) disclosed that Steve Brass, the president and CEO, and Sara Hyzer, the VP of Finance and CFO, are slated to speak at the upcoming 28th Annual ICR Conference in Orlando on January 13, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Interested individuals can access a live webcast of the session on the company's investor relations website, http://investor.wd40company.com. For those unable to tune in live, an archived version will be accessible on the website.

data.title: Ascentiz introduces first modular exoskeleton at CES 2026 with hip & knee technologies for natural movement.
data.description: Ascentiz, a leading company in wearable robotics, has unveiled the world's pioneering modular exoskeleton on January 9, 2026, in Las Vegas. This cutting-edge exoskeleton integrates quasi-direct-drive hip technology and cable-drive knee technology to offer seamless and robust movement support. The innovation promises natural and powerful assistance for users.

data.title: BARK receives "take private" proposal from Great Dane Ventures, LLC, led by Matt Meeker. (Numbers: NYSE: BARK, Schedule 13D filing, January 9, 2026)
data.description: In New York, BARK, Inc. (NYSE: BARK), a prominent international dog brand aiming to bring joy to all dogs, revealed that its Board of Directors has been presented with a preliminary non-binding proposal. Great Dane Ventures, LLC ("Great Dane"), a collective of existing stockholders led by Matt Meeker, the company's Chief, shared the proposal in a Letter detailed in a Schedule 13D submission on January 9, 2026.

data.title: Defense stocks slump after Trump orders halt to dividends, buybacks on contractors. Several major names drop: Redwire Corp. (NYSE: RDW) nearly 7%, Northrop Grumman Corp. (NYSE: NOC) over 4%, Lockheed Martin Corp. (NYSE: LMT) about 3.5%.
data.description: Defense industry stocks experienced a significant decline on Wednesday following President Donald Trump's directive for U.S. defense contractors to cease paying dividends and conducting share buybacks. The President accused the sector of prioritizing executive compensation over production investments. The iShares U.S. Aerospace & Defense ETF (NYSE: ITA) plummeted by over 1%, ending a three-session uptrend. Similarly, the SPDR S&P Aerospace & Defense ETF Trust (NYSE: XAR) saw a drop of approximately 0.9%. Major defense companies were particularly impacted, with Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW) witnessing a nearly 7% decline, Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) falling by more than 4%, Lockheed Martin Corporation (NYSE: LMT) declining around 3.5%, and VSE Corporation (NASDAQ: VSEC) experiencing a loss. Further details can be found on financial news platform Benzinga.com.

data.title: Nasdaq and CME partner to introduce Nasdaq-CME Crypto Index, enhancing crypto investment opportunities amid rising market complexity.
data.description: Experts predict that cryptocurrency index benchmarks and investment vehicles linked to crypto indexes will become more popular as the market becomes more intricate. This trend is expected to grow due to the escalating complexity of the market.

data.title: Vasta Platform Limited delisting from NASDAQ voluntarily, notifying Nasdaq of decision, Shares to be delisted.
data.description: In Sao Paulo, Vasta Platform Limited (NASDAQ: VSTA), a prominent education company in Brazil, has decided to voluntarily delist its Class A Common Shares from the Nasdaq Global Select Market. The company, a high-growth player in the education sector, notified Nasdaq of this choice. Vasta's Class A Common Shares have a par value of U.S.$0.00005 per share. The parent company, Cogna Educação S.A. in Brazil, had previously disclosed this impending delisting.

data.title: Pan American Energy extends marketing program with Upswitch Media Corp for an additional 60 days starting January 12, 2026.
data.description: Pan American Energy Corp. (PNRG) has extended its engagement with Upswitch Media Corp. for marketing services. The company, based in Calgary, Alberta, announced on January 9, 2026, that the extension will last for an anticipated 60 days starting around January 12, 2026. Upswitch Media Corp. can be contacted via email at info@upswitchmedia.com or by phone at 604-373-5875. The address of Upswitch Media Corp. is 2709B 43rd Ave., Suite 1013, Vernon, British Columbia. The engagement extension follows a previous news release on September 5, 2025. The marketing services term duration is subject to management's discretion for further extension or shortening. Pan American Energy Corp.'s stock symbols are CSE: PNRG, OTC PINK: PAANF, and FRA: SS6.

data.title: Applied Digital Corporation (Nasdaq: APLD) reported Q2 2026 financial results for the quarter ended Nov 30, 2025.
data.description: On January 7, 2026, Applied Digital Corporation (Nasdaq: APLD) announced its financial results for the fiscal second quarter ending on November 30, 2025. Applied Digital, specializing in designing, constructing, and managing high-performance, environmentally friendly data centers and colocation services for artificial intelligence, cloud computing, networking, and blockchain applications, revealed operational information alongside its financial performance.

data.title: Genelux Corporation plans a public offering of common stock on Nasdaq (GNLX). Underwriter may have option for 15% more. Market conditions can affect completion.
data.description: Genelux Corporation, a late clinical-stage immuno-oncology company based in Westlake Village, California, has announced the commencement of a proposed underwritten public offering of its common stock on Jan. 7, 2026. The company, listed as GNLX on Nasdaq, plans to offer all shares in the offering and expects to provide the underwriter with a 30-day option to acquire up to an additional 15% of the shares sold. This offering is subject to market conditions and standard closing procedures, with uncertainties regarding its completion, size, and terms.
